verification_rules.expected_result: Average resolution time <= 30 days (or applicable RBI limit). Escalation rate within acceptable threshold. No unresolved grievances beyond 60 days.
verification_rules.reasoning: Grievance statistics are stored in CRM systems and are directly queryable. An independent reviewer can compute resolution times without asking the customer service team.
